ab: Mpitu patis hido dehuk ku sapah pyasan ali saya.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Prading mpuuyas di, meyah remux sapah ttgsaan ka mptgesa, “Tutuy! Tmhuku!” mesa ka mdudul miyan.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Paru ba kari nami mesa, “Sndamac su bale mptgesa.”
Muuyas miyan de, tgsaan nami na kari ssepu ka mptgesa.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Seediq language of numbers.

ab: Smnegul nami mptgesa smepu ma, muuyas nami uyas sspegan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Eguw bale ka snlhayan mu kari miyan Seediq.
en: I have learned many Seediq languages.

ab: Mosa ku sapah pyasan klaali, smluhe ku kari nami Seediq klaali, saun mu pqbahang bubu mu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天在學校學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Seediq language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
